title: vincetoxicum officinale var. ochroleucum
intro: Vincetoxicum officinale var. ochroleucum, also known as Yellow Swallowwort, is a plant species in the Asclepiadaceae family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Yellow Swallowwort include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it as a treatment.
